ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the stock exchange was founded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the stock exchange */,
  "listing_rules" TEXT /* Listing rules for the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of the stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., software, banking) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the stock had its initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange hour */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "lunch_break_start" TEXT /* Start time of the lunch break */,
  "lunch_break_end" TEXT /* End time of the lunch break */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_hours_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange holiday */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "observance" TEXT /* Observance of the holiday (e.g., full-day, half-day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_holidays_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_split" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_split_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend */,
  "amount" REAL /* Dividend amount */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Payment date of the dividend */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date of the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financial statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
